pr.title: Record: 11L TrigramHash + ValueResidual + GradQuant + AdamW TTT (mean val_bpb=1.1132, best 1.1101)

output.summary: Adds trigram hash embeddings, value-residual blending, and gradient-guided adaptive quantization to the 11-layer TTT stack for better quality-per-step.
techniques: TrigramHash adds 3-token hashed embeddings before transformer blocks
Value Residual blends first-layer V vectors into every layer via learned scalars
Gradient-guided quantization ranks tensors by sensitivity for Int5/6/7 allocation
